Last but not least utilizing an escrow account so what is an escrow account. An escrow account is a hold on a portion of your commission's payments out to your sales rep. So the thought behind it is basically, you know, hey for the first three months of your time here at this company we're going to build a account it's almost a bit of like an insurance policy.
